---
title: 调整排序
description: /env/orderItem、/env/order
---
import { PUT } from '@/components/RequestTag';

## 变量项

<PUT>/env/orderItem</PUT>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    order: {
      description: '目的修改位置',
      type: 'number',
    },
    moveToEnd: {
      description: '是否移动到最后',
      type: 'boolean',
    },
  }}
/>

## 变量组

<PUT>/env/order</PUT>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    order: {
      description: '目的修改位置',
      type: 'number',
    },
    moveToEnd: {
      description: '是否移动到最后',
      type: 'boolean',
    },
  }}
/>
